content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Hexagons!". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/630/D
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of hexagons. Then n lines follow, each containing six integers representing the sides of the hexagon in clockwise order.
content.outputFormat: Output the maximum number of hexagons that can be cut from the given hexagons.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: To solve this problem, we can use a greedy approach. We start by sorting the hexagons based on their areas in descending order. Then, we try to cut as many hexagons as possible from each hexagon in the sorted order.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
for _ in range(n):
    sides = list(map(int, input().split()))
    # calculate and print the result
